message:
fix(render): strip C1 controls in sanitizer, fix proptest Rust 2024 compat

Security fix: UTF-8 encoded C1 controls (U+0080..U+009F) were passing
through both fast and slow paths of sanitize(). Added has_c1_controls()
for fast path detection and C1 check in slow path UTF-8 decoder.

Also fixed proptest macro compilation in cell.rs for Rust 2024 edition
by converting multi-argument syntax to tuple-based strategies.

Added adversarial tests for all C1 control characters and proptest
property ensuring output never contains C1 controls.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
